questionHtml: Using a fully labelled diagram, outline the relationship between marginal product (MP) and average product (AP) of labour.
markschemeHtml: The vertical axis may be labelled Marginal/Average Product, Product, Output, (or abbreviations of these). The horizontal axis may be labelled (Quantity of) labour, workers, variable factor, input.
